HEXAGRAM_POWER.title: Hexagram
HEXAGRAM_POWER.description: For each stack of [gold]Hexagram[/gold] can make 1 random effect to get the best result (The random range takes the maximum value, and the random probablity becomes 100%. The stack of [gold]Hexagram[/gold] will remove 1 stack for each trigger of its effect).
STAR_POINT_POWER.title: Star Point
STAR_POINT_POWER.description:
The third and sixth slots of your hand cards are the default [gold]Star Point[/gold].
The card on [gold]Star Point[/gold] can trigger its [gold]Star Point[/gold] effects if applicable.
STAR_POINT_POWER.smartDescription:
The third and sixth slots of your hand cards are the default [gold]Star Point[/gold].
The card on [gold]Star Point[/gold] can trigger its [gold]Star Point[/gold] effects if applicable.
Current [gold]Star Point[/gold]s: {StarPointList}。
STAR_POWER_POWER.title: Star Power
STAR_POWER_POWER.description:
For each stack of [gold]Star Power[/gold], the cards on the [gold]Star Point[/gold] will increase 1 damage when attacking.
The third and sixth slots of your hand cards are the default [gold]Star Point[/gold].
